title: gambling and casino
description: brings gambling and a casino to minecraft
body:
This addon adds a casino environment to Minecraft, along with basic cosmetic systems meant to represent money and tokens. These features are visual only and not tied to a functioning economy.

Features

Casino building fully included

Money items (cosmetic; no working economy system)

Token items (cosmetic; not used for anything)

Slot machines and other casino props

Machines may or may not function, depending on your setup

Notes

No functional currency or token mechanics.

Intended mainly for decoration, roleplay, and server atmosphere.
